_comment: Reference run outputs per case — the evidence pool + answer a healthy pipeline would produce. The gate feeds each {answer, evidence} through the REAL EntailmentAnswerVerifier (HeuristicEntailmentJudge, offline) to derive claim verdicts. For contradiction cases the answer deliberately asserts what the evidence opposes (negation parity / polarity pair / numeric conflict). evidence[].retrieved_by='contrastive' marks counter-evidence and feeds contrastive_coverage. Every gold_evidence_id in cases.json must appear here.
